title: Go Pink!
description: A resource pack for Breast Cancer Awareness Month that changes diamond-related items to pink (pink armor, pink tools, pink gems, etc...).
body:
Go Pink - Minecraft Resource Pack

This pack transforms all diamond-related items into pink variants. Diamonds become pink gems, armor turns into a bold pink set, and tools and weapons have a matching pink style. Every diamond-based item has been recolored for a consistent, supportive theme.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f321c7bc64ff17585cffbbfba53fb0ac71be4ad.png)

Created by Wildfire.
